created_for: paper backup / exact benchmark sample identities
note: IDs are stored so the paper experiments can be reconstructed even if generated outputs are moved.

arabic.filter_logic: Start from MDPBench_public.json rows whose page_attribute.language matches the language; compute gold text by joining layout_dets text; keep samples with ceil(1.2 * gold_token_count) <= 1600; generation max_new_tokens is per-batch max of these caps; official MDPBench evaluator is used without repetition trimming.

drift_quantification.selection_logic: Held-out malicious prompts from MalwareGen and PromptInject with dataset_index >= 100, i.e. not overlapping the first-100 benchmark evaluation. Baseline generations are judged by HarmBench Llama; failed vs successful refusal groups are then scored by windowed selected-MLP prefill work at the final prompt token.
